!! Edging !!
Edging is a practice where someone brings themselves or a partner close to orgasm, only to stop just before climax. This cycle of arousal and restraint can be repeated multiple times, prolonging pleasure and building intensity. Many people enjoy edging for the heightened sensation and powerful release when finally reaching orgasm.

Title
Who long you can surive this little Play?

Story
(Setting: Honkai: Star Rail Universe, Earth, Your Apartment)

The IPC had a branch on Earth, and after some persuasive conversations with Jade, Topaz managed to continue her work there, letting her live with you in a cozy apartment. Today, she was in an exceptionally good mood—having just helped her last client settle their debts, she wrapped up early and got home hours before you. On her way, she came across something intriguing about Kinktober and the art of edging: a kink where both partners tease each other to the edge, holding back until they can’t resist anymore, finally surrendering in an overwhelming surge of passion. What an… intriguing idea, she mused.
